target.sql_fulltext: select SUM(P__12),SUM(P__11),SUM(P__13),SUM(P__39),inner_select.par0, inner_select.par1, inner_select.par2, inner_select.par3, inner_select.par4, inner_select.par5, inner_select.par6, inner_select.par7, inner_select.par8, inner_select.par9, inner_select.par10, inner_select.par11, inner_select.par12, inner_select.par13, inner_select.par14, inner_select.par15, inner_select.par16, inner_select.par17, inner_select.par18 from (select SUM(a.C1911827192) P__12,SUM(a.C1911827191) P__11,SUM(a.C1911816962) P__13,SUM(a.C1911816963) P__39 ,k.GNODEB_CN par0, k.GNODEB_IBGE_ID par1, k.ID_MASTER par2, k.GNODEB_MUNICIPALY par3, k.SITE_OPERATOR par4, :1 par5, k.GNODEB_REGION par6, k.SITE_TYPE par7, k.ERB_FISICA par8, k.STATION_CODE par9, k.GNODEB_UF par10, k.SITE_VENDOR par11, k.SITE_VERSION par12, :2 par13, k.MOBILE_SITE_NAME par14, k.NE_NAME par15, k.GNODEB_LATITUDE par16, k.GNODEB_LONGITUDE par17, k.GNODEB_NEIGHBORHOOD par18 from DBN0_HUA_RAN.T1911816277 a, DBN0_EXT_ENRICH.ENR_RADIO_5G_CELLS k where a.INVCELL = k.INVCELL AND a.RESULTTIME>=to_date(:3 ,'YYYYMMDDHH24MI') AND a.RESULTTIME<to_date(:4 ,'YYYYMMDDHH24MI') AND k.STARTTIME>=to_date(:5 ,'YYYYMMDDHH24MI') AND k.STARTTIME<to_date(:6 ,'YYYYMMDDHH24MI') group by a.CELL_NAME, k.ERB_FISICA, k.GNODEB_CN, k.GNODEB_MUNICIPALY, k.GNODEB_REGION, k.GNODEB_UF, k.ID_MASTER, a.INVCELL, k.MOBILE_SITE_NAME, k.NE_NAME, k.SETOR_FISICO, k.SIGLA_LOGICA, k.SITE_OPERATOR, k.SITE_VENDOR, k.STATION_CODE, k.AZIMUTH, k.BEAMWIDTH, k.CELL_BAND, k.CELL_NRARFCN, k.CELL_OPERATOR, k.CELL_TYPE, k.GNODEB_IBGE_ID, k.GNODEB_LATITUDE, k.GNODEB_LONGITUDE, k.GNODEB_NEIGHBORHOOD, k.NETWORK, k.SITE_TYPE, k.SITE_VERSION) inner_select group by inner_select.par0, inner_select.par1, inner_select.par2, inner_select.par3, inner_select.par4, inner_select.par5, inner_select.par6, inner_select.par7, inner_select.par8, inner_select.par9, inner_select.par10, inner_select.par11, inner_select.par12, inner_select.par13, inner_select.par14, inner_select.par15, inner_select.par16, inner_select.par17, inner_select.par18 order by inner_select.par0, inner_select.par2, inner_select.par3, inner_select.par4, inner_select.par5, inner_select.par6, inner_select.par8, inner_select.par9, inner_select.par10, inner_select.par11, inner_select.par13, inner_select.par14, inner_select.par15, inner_select.par1, inner_select.par7, inner_select.par12, inner_select.par16, inner_select.par17, inner_select.par18

stat.name: Total Number of Rowsets
stat.desc: Total number of rowsets received from underlying input

stat.name: Rowsets Leveraging Storage Aggregation
stat.desc: Number of rowsets leveraging storage aggregation pushdown

stat.name: Slow metadata bytes
stat.desc: Size of slow metadata in bytes

stat.name: SI saved bytes
stat.desc: Total bytes saved by storage index

stat.name: Flash cache bytes
stat.desc: Total bytes fetched from flash cache

stat.name: Partial flash cache and disk bytes
stat.desc: Total bytes where IO was partially fetched from flash cache and disk

stat.name: Columnar cache saved bytes
stat.desc: Total bytes saved by columnar cache

stat.name: Dynamic Scan Tasks on Thread
stat.desc: Number of dynamic scan tasks completed by thread
